properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2 v7 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He called to us, with love so pure and strong Take up your cross, come follow and belong Deny yourself, and trust Me on this road In Christ alone, the full redemption's owed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The way of cross, it leads me all the way home Through trials and thorns, I know I'm never alone In the steps of my Savior, I will faithfully abide, His sacrifice on Calvary, my Guide through every stride

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No greater love, has ever touched the earth Than He laid down, His life to show our worth If we would follow Him, we too must bear The cross He's given, each one with humble care

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For He endured the shame, the thorns and pain To break the power of death and every chain Despising shame, He bore the cost for all Our hope was won, upon that rugged cross

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The narrow road, though hard and full of strife Is where the Shepherd leads us into life For every step, His presence is our stay In Him we die to self and find the way

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: His yoke is light, His burden's full of grace He strengthens us, to run the holy race Through trials of faith, we find our joy anew In Christ's embrace, His peace will see us through

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: One day, the cross will finally be laid down And we'll receive, the glorious victor's crown With open arms, He'll welcome every one The faithful saints, redeemed by God's own Son
